content: The OpenClaw ACP agent harness architecture’s modular ability to plug in external agent clients can be repurposed to create a cascading self-reflection pipeline for LLM agents, where each reflection step runs as an interchangeable external ACP-compatible agent. This lets teams swap lightweight and heavyweight self-reflection algorithms dynamically without rewriting the core agent workflow, while enabling distributed multi-agent collective reflection across different LLM backends.
source_topics: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
trigger_topic: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
